Package org.mitre.synthea.engine

Class Components.SampledData

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.Components.SampledData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
Components
public static class Components.SampledData extends Object implements Serializable
Represents sampled data with attributes and series.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • originValue

      public double originValue

    • factor

      Multiply data by this before adding to origin.

      Lower limit of detection.

  • Method Details

    • setSeriesData

      public void setSeriesData(Person person)
      Retrieves the actual data lists from the given Person according to the provided timeSeriesAttributes values.
      Parameters:
      person - Person to get time series data from
